emails.subject: Web Site Format
emails.body: Web Site Format Mike, I reviewed the pages to the site you provided. My only comment right now is that the correct name of the pipeline is "Houston Pipe Line Company". Note the Pipe Line is two words. Everything else looks fine. We will be getting back with you on the site access agreement.

emails.subject: Re: Web Site Format
emails.body: Re: Web Site Format Hi Gerald, where are we with regards to the TPA Registration agreements? we have a demo scheduled for 11/14 and it would be nice to have those posted on the website. thanks, mve
